description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named Build and Test that handles building, testing, and packaging a project across multiple environments and platforms. The workflow should trigger on push to master, develop, and tags starting with v*, as well as on pull requests to any branch. It should include various jobs for different configurations, such as building and testing on Ubuntu 18.04 and 20.04, Alpine Linux, and Docker-based environments, and packaging for Debian, RPM, and other platforms.
